rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sec 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 1, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CARMIGNANI's Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sec 128.7 DENIED. Moving party failed to show that Complaint was not presented primarily for improper purpose and that operative factual contentions were false/lacking evidentiary support after reasonable opportunity for further discovery. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN STONE INVESTMENT LLC VS. GABRIEL XIANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment Filed By Golden Stone Investment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 1, 2014, line 8. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN STONE INVESTMENT LLC's AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden and show that foreclosure sale was conducted in accordance with CC 2924. Specifically, there is no evidence that sale was conducted by proper trustee. = (501/REQ)
